results.rendered_html:
viśiṣṭa p. p.
1 Distinguished, distinct.
2 Particular, special, peculiar, distinctive.
3 Characterized by, endowed with, possessed of, having.
4 Superior, best (of all), eminent, excellent, choice; viśiṣṭāyā viśeṣeṇa saṃgamo guṇavān bhavet  Mb. 
— ṣṭaḥ N. of Viṣṇu.
Comp.
— advaitavādaḥ a doctrine of Rāmānuja which regards Brahman and Prakṛti as identical and real entities.
— buddhiḥ f. a distinguishing knowledge, differentiation.
— varṇa a. of an eminent or excellent colour.
